site.title: Kimvuka ya Kisalu Sambu na Kusadisa Bantu ya Bansi Yonso na Kubakisa Biblia
site.tagline: Bima ya Bantu Fwete Vanda na Yo Sambu Bantu Yonso Kunata Bo na Banzo ya Kimfumu
nav.label: Kisalu ya ntete
skip.toContent: Kwenda na mambu yina kele na kati
hero.home.eyebrow: Kusadila Babiblia na Kisika Yina Bantu Yonso Lenda Baka Mvutu
hero.projects.eyebrow: Kisalu ya kusonika bazina ya bantu yonso
hero.accessibility.eyebrow: Muntu lenda zwa yo kukonda mpasi
meta.home.description: IATF kebalulaka bampusa ya kyeleka ya bantu sambu na kuvanda ti bansangu ya bantu yonso.
meta.projects.description: Tala baprograme yina bo me basisaka na nzila ya IATF.
meta.propose.description: Lomba pula mosi na IATF na nzila ya Internet, ya e-mail, to ya Discord.
meta.governance.description: Tanga mutindu IATF kendimaka bisalu, ketwadisaka bisika ya bo kesonikaka bansangu, mpi ketaninaka bansangu ya bantu yonso.
meta.join.description: Mitindu ya kuvukana na IATF: kupesa kode, kubalula, kumeka, to kutanina kisalu.
meta.accessibility.description: Inki lukanu IATF kele na yo sambu na kutanina site Internet yai mpi nki mutindu beto lenda zabisa bantu ya nkaka mambu yina ke kanga beto nzila ya kusadila yo?
meta.transparency.description: Mikanda ya bantu yonso ya IATF: badesizio, bisalu, mpi bansangu ya mpa yina bo ke pesaka ntangu bo ke yidika yo.
actions.emailProjects: Beno tindila bo ba projet na bo na ba boîte de réception
actions.joinDiscord: Kukota na kimvuka ya bantu ya kukonda kuwakana
registry.empty.title: Bo me basisaka ntete ve baprograme na yo
registry.empty.body: IATF ke na kuyidika baprograme na yo ya ntete sambu na bantu yonso.
proposal.form.title: Tindila mono mukanda
proposal.form.body: Fulusa formilere yai ya kele na nsi sambu na kutindila IATF mukanda.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript kele mfunu sambu na kusadila webform yai. Kana yo kele ve, sadila email to Discord na kisika na yo.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Kisalu ya kutinda ba message na mbala mosi kele ve na kisika yai. Fomu yai ta kangula client na nge ya e-mail na kisika na yo.
proposal.form.loadingProtection: Kudibongisa sambu na kunata yo na lutaninu...
proposal.form.ready: Kana nge me tinda yo, IATF ta baka yo mpi ta sonika yo.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Na ntwala ya kutinda yo, tala kana yo kele ve ti ba message yina nge ke zola nde bo tindila nge.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Kimpwanza ya kutindila nge ba message ya kukonda mfunu me mana. Sosa yo diaka na ntwala ya kutinda yo.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Kisalu ya kukengila spam me salama ve na ntangu yayi. Meka diaka.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Kisalu ya kuditanina na bansangu ya kukonda mfunu me mana.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Kana nge me zola, fulusa batitre ya mfunu na ntwala ya kutinda yo.
proposal.form.submitting: Mono ke tinda mukanda sambu na kulomba lusadisu.
proposal.form.success: Mersi, beto me baka mukanda na nge mpi beto me bumba yo sambu beto tadila yo.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Kana nge solula diaka ti IATF sambu na kulomba nde bo pesa nge mukanda yai, sonika kisika bo me sonika yo awa na nsi.
proposal.form.successRecordLabel: Mambu ya bo sonikaka sambu na madia yina bo vandaka kunwa
proposal.form.successLinkLabel: Kisalu ya kusonika mambu yina bo bakaka
proposal.form.errorGeneric: kima mosi ya mbi me salama ntangu nge ke tinda mukanda. meka diaka. kana diambu ke landa kaka mutindu yina, sadila email na kisika na yo.
proposal.field.optional: Bo lenda pona na kusala yo
project.detail.eyebrow: Kisalu ya kusonika na mukanda sambu na bantu yonso
project.detail.problemTitle: Inki diambu ya mpasi kisalu yai me manisa?
project.detail.whyTitle: Sambu na nki bo salaka programe yai?
project.detail.scopeOutTitle: Kisalu na yo kele ve na kati ya mambu ya bo ketubila
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Yo kele na Kingelesi ya pete, mpi bo lenda balula yo na bandinga ya nkaka na nima
footer.label: Lutiti ya zulu ya site
footer.accessibility: Muntu lenda zwa yo kukonda mpasi
footer.licenseContent: Mambu ya kele na kati CC BY-SA 4.0
footer.blurb: Yo fwete vanda pete sambu na kuyantika kusala kisalu ya kupesa bantu nswa ya kukota na banzo ya bantu, kubasisa yo, mpi kutanina yo.
footer.source: Bangindu ya mfunu ya bansiku ya kesadisaka bantu na kukota na banzo ya bantu yankaka: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/). Bikalulu ya bantu yina kesadilaka bametode ya kusadisaka bantu na kubakisa mambu.
footer.contactLabel: Muntu ya Nge Lenda Solula ti Yandi
contact.label: Muntu ya Nge Lenda Solula ti Yandi
translation.label: Mutindu bo me balula yo
translation.source: Kingelesi kele ndinga ya kisina ya lutiti yai.
translation.humanReviewed: Muntu mosi ya mezaba kutuba mbote-mbote ndinga yango kutomisaka mbalula yai.
translation.machineAssisted: Mbalula yai me salama na masini, mpi ata muntu mosi ve ya me zaba kutuba mbote me balula yo mbote-mbote.
translation.needsUpdate: Bo tadilaka mbalula yai na ntwala ya kutomisa yo na Kingelesi mpi yo lenda vanda mfunu nde bo tomisa yo.
translation.report: Pesa rapore ya diambu mosi ya bo me balula: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Keti nge me zaba yo ?
